name: Swimming and Drowning
description: Men in metal must shed armor or drown: plate 100%, chain 80% (must remove), leather 20% (need not), none 05% if thrown overboard; gale or storm drowns any man in the water 50% per turn. Half of all sailors swim. Swimming is 3"/turn; the swimmer may be picked up by any ship at slow oars or under 15"/turn — if he consents. Only daggers and buoyant wood (club, quarterstaff, spear) can be carried swimming.
